# CWE-378 vulnerable — Creation of Temporary File With Insecure Permissions
lang: go
file: CWE-378-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func CacheExportChunk(c *GinCtx) error {
	tmp := filepath.Join(os.TempDir(), "export-"+c.Request.URL.Query().Get("job")+".bin")
	return os.WriteFile(tmp, []byte(c.Request.PostFormValue("chunk")), 0666)
}
